title: pseuderanthemum tuberculatum
intro: Pseuderanthemum tuberculatum, also known as the Rough-leaved Pseuderanthemum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in Africa and Asia, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pseuderanthemum tuberculatum include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by boiling the leaves in water or using them in teas, and it is also used in traditional remedies for skin conditions and wounds.
